observed_event: Qwen3.6 and Qwen3-Coder-Next cannot currently co-serve on the available 2x RTX 5090 under their intended serving configurations. DW's intended standard role flow requires GENERATE=Qwen3-Coder-Next and AUDIT=Qwen3.6. The Development Manager requested human selection of an audit / model-switch operating mode before continuing the next RRI-through-DW work. A human decision is currently required because the system does not yet know which operating mode is operationally preferable.
known_consequence: Human is currently acting as the operational scheduler and architecture glue.
